allow: PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd F:\\repository\\voyagerss\\backend; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd F:\\repository\\voyagerss\\frontend; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell($ports = @\(9002, 9003\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { $name = \(Get-Process -Id $proc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; "Port $p → PID $proc \($name\) RUNNING" } else { "Port $p → FREE" } })
PowerShell(cd F:\\repository\\voyagerss\\backend; $env:DATABASE_URL_WORKSCHD="mysql://root:admin@localhost:3306/workschd"; npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/workschd.prisma 2>&1)
PowerShell(cd F:\\repository\\voyagerss\\backend; $env:DATABASE_URL_WORKSCHD="mysql://root:admin@localhost:3306/workschd"; npx prisma migrate status --schema prisma/workschd.prisma 2>&1)
PowerShell(cd F:\\repository\\voyagerss\\backend; $env:DATABASE_URL_WORKSCHD="mysql://root:admin@localhost:3306/workschd"; npx prisma generate --schema prisma/workschd.prisma 2>&1 | tail -5)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.State -eq 'Listen' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Port 9002 freed")

PowerShell(Set-Location "F:\\repository\\voyagerss\\backend"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node.exe" -ArgumentList "node_modules/ts-node/bin/ts-node.js --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register src/main.ts" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $output = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:9002/health" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $output)
